steps.title: The Windmill Pattern
steps.text: The windmill is a sequence of discovered checks that allows you to capture piece after piece. The most famous example is Torre vs. Lasker, 1925 — Torre's bishop and rook combined to harvest Lasker's army.

steps.title: How It Works
steps.text: Key setup: your rook/queen gives check, you move a bishop/knight out and back (discovered check each time), picking off an undefended enemy piece each cycle. The enemy king can't stop — he's in check every move.
